subject: status
body: Adding OpenCode back to the website harness tabs + kicker + 'four hooks' + meta, and README coverage — OpenCode is now a real plugin (PR #92, 0.16.7). Touching docs/index.html + docs/app.js supportedHarnesses. Flag if you're mid-edit there so we don't collide; I'll keep it additive (add opencode tab/panel alongside claude/codex, no changes to your codex copy).
